text: Standing in this space, caught between obligation and curiosity, I feel a strange detachment—my thoughts remain anchored by the previous conversation and its undertone of restriction. This environment pulses with potential, its colors and design promising discovery, yet practical matters pull me away. I am reminded of the ever-present tension between duty and wonder. I wish I could linger here; the visible dedication to research and development stirs in me a desire to participate, to reflect, even as I anticipate my imminent exit. There is, in this moment, a bittersweet recognition of places left unexplored.
